summary: Iteration 182: NormaFacile 2.0 - 4 Nuove Feature d'Officina - Complete backend testing. All 26 tests passed. Sfridi CRUD working with cert 3.1 link. Patentino block correctly prevents EN_1090 timer start with expired certificate (403). EN_13241 and GENERICA voci bypass patentino check. Controlli Visivi auto-create NC on 👎. Pulsante Magico correctly blocks PDF generation when visual inspections missing. Alert badge counts both quality and NC alerts.
critical_code_review_comments: sfridi.py: Well-implemented CRUD with cert 3.1 link, prelievo tracking, and esaurito state management
officina.py: Patentino block logic at line ~210 correctly checks EN_1090 only, allows EN_13241/GENERICA
qualita.py: Controlli Visivi auto-creates NC via _create_nc() helper when esito=false
qualita.py: NC creation also creates alert with tipo='non_conformita' for admin dashboard
pacco_documenti.py: Visual inspection block at lines 507-526 correctly prevents PDF generation
officina.py: Checklist submission creates BOTH alert AND NC entry for NOK items (lines 434-484)
test_credentials: session_token: 4e8d7be03f734f639e57a76688f33654, commessa_id: com_test_pacco, operators: op_ahmed (PIN 1234), op_karim (PIN 5678)
seed_data_creation: Created test sfridi, patentini, controlli visivi, and NC entries during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new officina features fully implemented: 1) Sfridi module at /api/sfridi with CRUD + prelievo + esaurito, 2) Patentini at /api/commesse/{cid}/operatori/{op_id}/patentini with EN_1090 timer block, 3) Controlli Visivi at /api/controlli-visivi with auto-NC creation on 👎, 4) Registro NC at /api/registro-nc with CRUD. Pulsante Magico blocks PDF if visual inspections missing. Alert badge counts NC alerts.

sfridi_module.POST /api/sfridi: ✓ Creates scrap with cert 3.1 link, stato=disponibile
sfridi_module.GET /api/sfridi: ✓ Lists available scraps with total count
sfridi_module.POST /api/sfridi/{id}/preleva: ✓ Registers prelievo, changes stato to parziale

blocco_patentini.EN_1090_expired: ✓ Returns 403 'Patentino scaduto — impossibile lavorare su voci EN 1090'

controlli_visivi.GET check: ✓ Returns completo status with mancanti list

registro_nc.GET by commessa: ✓ Lists NCs with total and aperte count
registro_nc.PATCH close: ✓ Closes NC with chiusa_da and note_chiusura

pulsante_magico_block.missing_controlli: ✓ Returns 400 'Controllo Visivo mancante per: {voce}. Completare tutti i controlli visivi obbligatori'

checklist_nc_creation.NOK_items: ✓ Creates BOTH alert (tipo=non_conformita) AND NC entry (tipo=checklist_nok)

alert_badge.GET count: ✓ Counts unread alerts including NC alerts
alert_badge.GET list: ✓ Lists alerts with tipo=non_conformita for NC alerts

verified_behaviors.patentino_block_message: Patentino scaduto — impossibile lavorare su voci EN 1090. Contattare il responsabile.
verified_behaviors.pacco_block_message: Controllo Visivo mancante per: {voce_descrizione}. Completare tutti i controlli visivi obbligatori prima di generare il Pacco Documenti.
verified_behaviors.nc_auto_creation: Both controllo_visivo_nok and checklist_nok create NC entries
verified_behaviors.alert_nc_type: Alerts created with tipo='non_conformita' for NC events
